test.note: No dedicated test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml; build was used as the available full-suite validator.

blockingIssues.description: creator_profile.bio column required by feature contract is missing from db/schema.sql.
Story Bank convert flow does not validate PATCH /api/story-bank/{id} response before reporting success, so story may not be marked used.
Inline fontFamily style remains in teleprompter page, violating feature expectation to remove inline font styles.
Multiple inline fontFamily styles remain in TeleprompterReader, so font cleanup is incomplete.

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.init = "bash .factory/init.sh" to document the setup command workers already use.
Updated dependency notes in .factory/library/environment.md to reflect that @anthropic-ai/sdk and @insforge/nextjs were removed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update fullstack-worker skill to explicitly require agent-browser verification for UI features and enforce accurate skillFeedback.followedProcedure reporting when steps are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews (fix-login-signup-mode-param, fix-series-nav-and-ideas-conversion, fix-storymine-convert-button, fix-api-validation-and-library-bulk-ops, fix-todays-prompt-caching-and-deps) reported no agent-browser usage despite UI changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether build and lint are both mandatory per feature and define enforcement expectations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for fix-login-signup-mode-param and fix-mobile-nav-and-fonts observed per-feature validation drift against documented guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify data-access boundary by distinguishing allowed read patterns from mutation requirements (mutations via API routes vs direct SDK reads).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for fix-creator-profile-table-and-settings, fix-storymine-convert-button, and fix-api-validation-and-library-bulk-ops found inconsistent interpretation of client-side InsForge usage rules.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document canonical schema ownership between db/schema.sql and src/lib/schema.sql (or require synchronization strategy) to reduce schema drift confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for fix-creator-profile-table-and-settings flagged ambiguity after worker had to inspect both schema files.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated reports that fullstack-worker lacked agent-browser usage for UI features.
Auth-gated page verification nuance for agent-browser.
Conventions notes about direct client mutation in specific files.
rejectedObservations.reason: merged into broader AGENTS.md data-access ambiguity recommendation
